creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
I just read the attachment of this ticket. It looks to me like the issue is about jdk1.6.0_3 which was deleted from ports in 2012. (http://www.freshports.org/java/jdk16)

So a better status might be:
Closed:
- Overcome By Events
- Not Enough Information
- Feedback Timeout
